message:
test(conformance): add events no-handlers test + fix exec paths (bd-6vcm)

Add events_emit_no_handlers_still_resolves test to reach 10+ events
target. Fix exec test command paths (/bin/echo, /bin/sh). All 89
dispatcher conformance tests pass, meeting all category targets.
